codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit e373ae8 against the feature contract: schema.ts defines 19 required application tables with expected column sets and key foreign-key relationships, migration SQL was generated and committed, migrate.ts and db/index.ts enable WAL and foreign_keys, and seed.ts inserts the required default groups/settings/admin with bcrypt hashing.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill procedure appears too broad for DB-only features: it mandates API/UI red-green cycles and manual agent-browser checks, but this database schema feature was completed without those steps while still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/nbbaier/68kb/.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure steps 4-8) vs transcript skeleton for session e7d3adc2-a3c7-4809-8b26-1fb4d083ae94 (no agent-browser calls, no UI/API implementation steps), and handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true

sharedStateObservations.observation: A useful SQLite testing caveat surfaced during implementation: WAL mode is not supported on in-memory databases, which caused a test adjustment. This caveat is not currently captured in shared library docs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session e7d3adc2-a3c7-4809-8b26-1fb4d083ae94 includes: 'WAL mode test failed because in-memory SQLite doesn't support WAL mode'; /Users/nbbaier/68kb/.factory/library/architecture.md and environment.md do not document this testing nuance

summary: PASS: Feature implementation satisfies the database-schema-migrations-seed requirements and expected behaviors based on the reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. No code defects were identified in-scope; two shared-state improvement observations were recorded.
